# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd default authorization policy for a namespace. Configure policy to handle services without explicit authorization rules. Set up default behavior for service-to-service communication. This is for our service mesh policy framework.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd policy default allow and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_policy_default_allow

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: default-policy-server
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
    linkerd.io/control-plane-component: policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: default-policy
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: deny-all-unauthenticated
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Denies all unauthenticated traffic by default - services must explicitly opt-in to receive traffic"
spec:
  server:
    name: default-policy-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "*.linkerd-policy.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-policy
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Default deny authorization policy - all service-to-service communication must be explicitly authorized via MeshTLS identity"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-policy-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-tls-authentication
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-tls-authentication
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Requires valid mTLS identity for all service communication - no unauthenticated or plaintext traffic allowed"
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: default
      namespace: linkerd-policy
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: linkerd-admin-allow
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Allows only linkerd control plane components to access admin endpoints with verified mTLS identity"
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: default-policy-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: linkerd-admin-authn
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: linkerd-admin-authn
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Restricts admin access to verified linkerd control plane service accounts only"
spec:
  identityRefs:
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-destination
      namespace: linkerd
    - kind: ServiceAccount
      name: linkerd-identity
      namespace: linkerd
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: HTTPRoute
metadata:
  name: default-policy-health
  namespace: linkerd-policy
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: linkerd
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: linkerd-policy
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/created-by: linkerd/policy
    description: "Health check route restricted to probes from the kubelet only"
spec:
  parentRefs:
    - name: default-policy-server
      kind: Server
      group: policy.linkerd.io
  rules:
    - matches:
        - path:
            value: /healthz
            type: Exact
          method: GET
        - path:
            value: /ready
            type: Exact
          method: GET
